title: Let me play Iris!
description: Removes the message telling you to not use Not Enough Crashes from Iris
body:
This mod removes the Not Enough Crashes warning message upon loading with Iris

It does so by hiding that NEC exist to Iris

Works on all version of Iris starting with 1.5.2 and any 1.19 version

THE MOD IS DISCOUNTINUED DUE TO IT BEING INTEGRATED IN NEC
